summary: Bandit security scan completed across all 6 suites (163,183 LOC). PASS verdict: 0 HIGH severity findings, 67 MEDIUM findings (mostly SQL injection false positives and configuration issues), 0 LOW findings. No immediate critical vulnerabilities detected.
assessment: Security posture is acceptable for this stage. No HIGH severity vulnerabilities. All 67 MEDIUM findings should be reviewed for false positives (especially SQL injection in parameterized ORM code). Recommend addressing URL scheme restrictions and temp file permissions as quick wins.
issues: 34 SQL injection findings - most likely false positives from SQLAlchemy parameterized queries, requires code review
14 URL scheme findings in cli.py and single_agent.py - should restrict to http/https only
11 temp file findings - verify secure mode/permission flags are used
5 interface binding findings - restrict to localhost or specific IPs in production
recommendations: Review SQL injection findings for false positives
Restrict network bindings in production configs
Use defusedxml for XML parsing in scanner_parsers.py:124
